endpoints.name: Get all orders
endpoints.description: You can display a list of all orders with the query parameter filter criteria.

endpoints.name: Get all released orders
endpoints.description: You can display all released orders that have been created and are ready for fulfilment.

endpoints.name: Get released orders for next page
endpoints.description: You can display all released orders that have been created and are ready for fulfilment with nextCursor path parameter.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NEXTCURSOR}} with a real nextcursor.

endpoints.name: Get an order
endpoints.description: You can display details of a specific order based on the purchaseOrderId.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PURCHASEORDERID}} with a real purchaseorderid.

endpoints.name: Acknowledge orders
endpoints.description: You can acknowledge an entire order, including all of its order lines. Walmart business rules require to acknowledge orders within four hour of receipt of the order, except in extenuating circumstances.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PURCHASEORDERID}} with a real purchaseorderid.

endpoints.name: Get orders for next page
endpoints.description: You can display a list of all orders with nextCursor path parameter pagination criteria.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NEXTCURSOR}} with a real nextcursor.
